name: lib-starter
summary: Reusable library skeleton starter: a placeholder README plus per-language packaging/test/build command wiring (framework-required baseline for the library shape).
post-apply-notes: Pick the language variant matching the project; quick-start-template applies that variant's test/build/lint/typecheck commands into the CLAUDE.md commands table + the v1.26 code-quality block (not edited inline). Starter payload: a placeholder README.md only — bring your own public-API module and test harness source. Config defaults are applied via model-effort-profile-switch + workflow-variant-switch.
